meaning: n.杂种,混血儿,混合物adj.混合的,杂种的
examples: Hybrid cars can go almost 600 miles between refuelling.
Hybrid cars do little harm to the environment.
A mule is a hybrid of a male donkey and a female horse.
And, of course, a hybrid or fuel-efficient car emits less carbon dioxide than an SUV.
So a diesel hybrid, in theory, will give you the best of both worlds.
